inlineContent.text: An array data structure that can contain a sequence of elements of any type. Elements are accessed by a numerical index starting at 0. Negative indices are used to count from the back (-1 is the last element, -2 is the second to last, etc.).
Arrays can be concatenated using the
Arrays are always passed by reference. To get a copy of an array that can be modified independently of the original array, use
Erasing elements while iterating over arrays is
supported and will result in unpredictable behavior.

abstract.text: A built-in data structure that holds a sequence of elements.

with no conversion.  These include all of the Variant types from Godot (for
SwiftGodot.Object) as well as the built-in Swift types UInt8, Int64 and Double.
